channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: My top 10 Amazon deals for a smarter office set-up — essential desk accessories from TP-Link, Lexar, Cooler Master, and more
item.description: Upgrade your workspace with discounted networking gear, keyboards, storage drives, mice and other everyday office accessories on Amazon.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds FE, Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 5 et clavier MSI Strike Pro Wireless : les 3 meilleurs bons plans du lundi 27 avril 2026
item.description: Ce lundi 27 avril 2026, plusieurs offres high-tech se démarquent avec des réductions particulièrement intéressantes.

item.title: Quelle config PC pour Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced ? Tous les détails
item.description: Après des mois de spéculations, Ubisoft a enfin officialisé Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced, le remake complet de l’opus sorti initialement en 2013. Qu'attendre de ce jeu et comment le faire tourner correctement ?

item.title: A Star Wars expansion is coming to PowerWash Simulator 2
item.description: There's something deeply relaxing about chucking on a solid pair of headphones, listening to some good music and cleaning muck off structures and vehicles. Not in real life, though. Heavens, no. PowerWash Simulator 2 lets you do that without having to deal with any actual muck — as long as you're regularly cleaning your keyboard or controller, anyway.You'll soon be able to carry out powerwashing jobs in six more locations, all of which are in a galaxy far, far away. In the game's upcoming Star Wars expansion, you can visit the likes of Tatooine and Hoth to clean the Lars homestead, an X-wing a...

item.title: OpenAI breaks out of exclusivity agreements in its partnership with Microsoft
item.description: OpenAI is opening up its partnership with Microsoft in the latest amendment to the major multi-year collaboration between the tech giants. The latest changes allow OpenAI to offer its latest AI models to other companies and through other cloud providers, stripping Microsoft of its exclusivity rights. In a joint announcement posted on OpenAI and Microsoft's websites, Microsoft will still be OpenAI's primary cloud partner with the latest products shipping first on Azure, but OpenAI is now allowed to use any cloud provider. Sam Altman, OpenAI's CEO, posted on X that the company is "now able to ma...

item.title: Samsung’s first smart glasses have leaked
item.description: The upcoming Samsung Galaxy Glasses look nearly identical to Meta's Ray-Ban smart glasses in leaked images from Android Headlines. The glasses, which could be announced at Google I/O next month, are code-named "Jinju" and will reportedly cost between $379 and $499, on par with the display-free Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2. They'll reportedly include a Qualcomm […]...

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Glasses : voici la réponse de Samsung aux Ray-Ban Meta avec Gemini
item.description: Voici le design très probable des premières lunettes connectées de Samsung : les Galaxy Glasses. Ces dernières se doteraient d'Android XR et de Gemini pour faire face aux Ray-Ban Meta.

item.title: Microsoft and OpenAI’s famed AGI agreement is dead
item.description: OpenAI and Microsoft's partnership-turned-situationship just got even less committed. And a clause about artificial general intelligence, which has for years dictated the future of their deal, has officially been dropped. On Monday morning, Microsoft announced a handful of big changes to its long-standing OpenAI deal. Microsoft will remain OpenAI's "primary cloud partner, and OpenAI products will ship first […]...

item.title: Recharge en 9 minutes et 630 km d’autonomie : le nouveau BYD Atto 3 veut détrôner Tesla
item.description: BYD dévoile la troisième génération de l’Atto 3. Le nouveau venu grandit à vue d’œil et monte en gamme. Sa technique change le plus, avec l’arrivée du Flash Charging permettant une charge complète en 9 minutes.

item.title: Recharge en 10 minutes : Huawei mise sur le solaire et les batteries pour contourner la faiblesse des réseaux électriques
item.description: Huawei a présenté au Salon de Pékin une version améliorée de son système de recharge pour voiture électrique dont la puissance peut grimper jusqu'à 1 500 kW en crête, intégrant désormais des panneaux solaires et le stockage stationnaire d'énergie. Une évolution logique, mais qui intervient dans un contexte de course effrénée où BYD et CATL poussent également leurs pions. ...

item.title: Investors back Skye’s AI home screen app for iPhone ahead of launch
item.description: Skye's new AI app attracted investors before it even launched — a sign of interest in a more AI-aware iPhone.

item.title: Get in line! Tesla Supercharger fights are on the rise over queue-jumpers — so the EV giant is rolling out a new 'Virtual Queue' system to help diffuse 'screaming arguments'
item.description: No more fisticuffs at Tesla Supercharger stations, as EV company introduces 'Virtual Queue' system to avoid fights over queue-jumping.

item.title: ‘This was not an isolated incident’: Chinese national exposed by NASA investigation in serial defense software theft phishing campaign that lasted years
item.description: NASA, the military, and numerous universities and private companies were targeted by this phishing campaign.

item.title: Crimson Desert has 'opened a new chapter in K-content', according to the South Korea Prime Minister — and the game's Steam player count highlights that, beating the likes of Marvel Rivals, and keeping players interested even more than Elden Ring did
item.description: Crimson Desert isn't slowing down at all, with the South Korean Prime Minister praising Pearl Abyss, and the player count soaring above live-service games.

item.title: Elon Musk’s XChat App Is More Like Facebook’s Messenger Than Signal
item.description: Rather than launching a sleek, worthwhile encrypted messaging app, Musk dropped a junky, insular extension of his social media platform.

item.title: The Philips Hue Sync Box 8K is 30 percent off
item.description: The Philips Hue Play HDMI Sync Box 8K is a great gadget to buy if you want to put your Hue lights to good use while watching a movie or playing video games. It syncs your lights to shine in colors displaying on your TV, and it’s steeply discounted right now to a slightly more […]

item.title: 14h d’autonomie et un poids plume : l’alternative PC au Macbook Air signée Honor
item.description: Honor renouvelle sa gamme de clones de MacBook : après le prometteur MagicBook Pro 14, voici le MagicBook 16. L'ultraportable mise encore sur la finesse, mais oublie l'Oled pour un écran LCD classique.

item.title: Mother's Day Deals on Smart Bird Feeders (2026)
item.description: These are some of the lowest prices we've seen on our favorite bird feeders with cameras. Save even more with our WIRED-exclusive coupon codes.

item.title: Quel smartphone Oppo choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: Oppo est de retour en France et plus largement en Europe. La marque chinoise est revenue sur le marché avec un nouveau téléphone haut de gamme.

item.title: Google Workspace gets a new intelligence layer to make Gemini more of an agentic assistant
item.description: Google has added a new Workspace Intelligence layer to Gemini to connect it to business files and data, your voice, and more.

item.title: Still frustrated with the Sonos app? People have been making alternatives using AI, so solve long-standing annoyances — and some are pretty damn cool
item.description: Since the Sonos app remains divisive, some owners of Sonos speakers have used AI to vibe code their own alternatives.

item.title: Man Utd vs Brentford Live Streams: How to watch Premier League 2025/26 from anywhere in the world
item.description: All the ways to watch Man Utd vs Brentford live streams online and from anywhere, as the Bees look to secure a third straight victory over United.

item.title: New AI framework autonomously optimizes training data, architectures and algorithms — outperforming human baselines
item.description: AI R&D runs on a cycle of hypothesis, experiment, and analysis — each step demanding substantial manual engineering effort. A new framework from researchers at SII-GAIR aims to close that bottleneck by automating the full optimization loop for training data, model architectures, and learning algorithms.A new framework called ASI-EVOLVE, developed by researchers at the Generative Artificial Intelligence Research Lab (SII-GAIR), aims to solve this bottleneck. Designed as an agentic system for AI-for-AI research, it uses a continuous "learn-design-experiment-analyze" cycle to automate the optimiz...

item.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
item.description: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are set to face off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of tech’s leading AI startup, OpenAI. The trial begins with jury selection on April 27th, as Musk pushes forward his 2024 lawsuit that accuses OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity […]

item.title: Xiaomi s’installe sur les terres de BMW et débauche chez Lamborghini et Porsche pour ses futures voitures électriques
item.description: Xiaomi a ouvert un centre de R&D en Bavière, recruté des ingénieurs chez BMW, Porsche et Lamborghini, et veut vendre ses voitures électriques sur le marché européen en 2027. On peut difficilement faire mieux quand on veut s'installer sur un nouveau marché et viser le segment des voitures haut de gamme.

item.title: Le JMGO N3 Ultimate, un vidéoprojecteur 4K avec gimbal motorisé et Google TV, est déjà en promo (-400 €)
item.description: Image 4K, Full HD à 240 Hz, bonne luminosité, nacelle motorisée... Présenté au CES 2026, le JMGO N3 Ultimate est enfin arrivé dans nos contrées, et sa fiche technique a de quoi nous intéresser. Quelques jours après son lancement, on le trouve déjà à 2 299 euros au lieu de 2 699 euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: iPhone Fold ou iPhone Ultra ? Apple pourrait nous surprendre sur le nom de son smartphone pliable
item.description: Tout le monde parle d'iPhone Fold pour désigner le futur smartphone pliable d'Apple, mais ce dernier pourrait finalement s'appeler iPhone Ultra.

item.title: The Argos bank holiday sale starts now with up to 40% off tech, appliances, toys, and more — here are the 13 best deals I've found
item.description: Argos has launched its bank holiday sale early, with discounts of up to 40% available across tech, appliances, toys, homewares, and more — here are the best 13 deals I've found.

item.title: Téléphone au volant : suspension immédiate du permis de conduire dès le 1er mai ? C’est pas tout à fait vrai
item.description: Le 1er mai, le téléphone au volant vaudra suspenssion de permis immédiate. C'est vrai, mais pas partout.

item.title: Intel reportedly selling 'scrap or low-expectation' chips is an ominous sign that CPU price hikes might get worse
item.description: 'Turning what may have been scrap or low-expectation output into revenue': Intel's seemingly found a new way to turn a profit on CPUs, and it's an ominous sign for pricing.

item.title: Beat the storage price hikes with my top 5 SSD deals — save on ultra-fast drives from Samsung, WD_Black, and Kingston with discounts up to $1043 in Amazon's Gaming Week sale
item.description: The WD_Black SSD gets a bigger price-drop than the last time we saw this on sale, but it's not the only internal drive on sale right now.

item.title: Data center demand drives 66% surge in natural gas power plant costs
item.description: Natural gas power plant costs have nearly doubled in two years and take 23% longer to build as data center electricity demand skyrockets.

item.title: Don't tell the boss but I've found 8 hybrid gaming & office chair deals for work and play in Amazon's surprise Gaming Week sale — save on stealth seating from Corsair, Razer, Eureka Ergonomic, and more
item.description: As an office chair reviewer, these are my favorite home office & gaming chairs for all-day comfort.

item.title: Right now is likely the best time to buy a MacBook — there's a model for everybody, and they're all on sale too
item.description: From the super-cheap Neo to the high-end MacBook Pro — right now is a fantastic time to consider picking up a new MacBook.

item.title: New 'Firestarter' malware flames on in spite of Cisco firewall updates and security patches
item.description: Security pros are warning about custom malware targeting Cisco firewalls, and surviving upgrades and reboots.

item.title: Microsoft Outlook down? Email problems hit users across the world - here's what we know
item.description: A major Microsoft Outlook outage is occuring - here's all the updates.

item.title: 'Definitely positive news': the Pixel boot bug nightmare might soon be over, but there's a new issue to worry about
item.description: There's good news about one persistent Pixel bug, but bad news about another issue hitting these phones.

item.title: Chez Samsung, une grève majeure menace la production mondiale de puces
item.description: Le syndicat menace d'une grève générale de 18 jours à partir du 21 mai si ses demandes de primes et d'augmentation salariale ne sont pas satisfaites.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 leak reveals ‘wide’ form factor
item.description: Samsung reportedly has a new foldable coming this year, and we just got an up-close look thanks to a new leak.

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs appareils photo abordables pour débutants en 2026 ?
item.description: Vous êtes à la recherche d'un boîtier photo à prix honnête ? Il s'agit souvent d'un investissement important. Voici notre sélection, après test, des meilleurs appareils photo « pas chers », qui proposent un bon rapport qualité/prix.

item.title: The Verge’s 2026 Mother’s Day gift guide
item.description: Whether it's managing a busy home or looking out for everyone around them, moms spend a lot of time every day caring for others. Mother's Day, May 10th, is an opportunity to return the favor, so we've rounded up practical gadgets and little luxuries that can lighten her load. This year's picks are designed to […]

item.title: Stop using your selfie camera — this affordable accessory has been the solution to my years-long vlogging headache
item.description: The Insta360 Snap Selfie Screen's genius design makes vlogging with your phone a breeze, and it's affordable too

item.title: Think you've got a marathon in you? I can't help you break a two-hour record, but I can help kit you out with everything you need to run your first race — here are 10 essential bits of running kit recommended by me, a fitness editor
item.description: Here are 10 road running essentials to get started, including affordable 'pocket rocket' running watches.

item.title: Un « ChatGPT » chez BoursoBank : comment le nouvel assistant Bourso.IA va transformer votre application
item.description: Bientôt, les clients de la banque en ligne BoursoBank vont pouvoir interagir avec un chatbot utilisant l'intelligence artificielle générative.

item.title: 'There will be no doubt who the gods have chosen to rule': House of the Dragon season 3 lands late June release date as fiery new trailer teases deadly events to come
item.description: The new trailer for House of the Dragon's third season confirms when the HBO Max show will officially return.

item.title: La TNT va-t-elle disparaître ? L’Arcom pose officiellement la question
item.description: Dans sa consultation publique d'avril 2026, l'Autorité de régulation de la communication audiovisuelle et numérique (Arcom) lève un tabou majeur : la perspective d'une fin de la Télévision Numérique Terrestre. Si l'arrêt définitif n'est pas encore programmé, l'hypothèse est désormais formellement posée et oblige les pouvoirs publics à anticiper une transition inédite pour le paysage audiovisuel français....

item.title: Elon Musk and ChatGPT’s Sam Altman head to an AI trial that promises clashing testimony
item.description: The high-stakes trial could change the balance of power in AI. Technology tycoons Elon Musk and Sam Altman are poised to face off in a high-stakes trial revolving around the alleged betrayal, deceit and unbridled ambition that blurred the bickering billionaires’ once-shared vision for the development of artificial intelligence.The trial, which is scheduled to begin Monday with jury selection, centers on the 2015 birth of ChatGPT maker OpenAI as a nonprofit startup primarily funded by Musk before evolving into a capitalistic venture now valued at $852 billion.The trial’s outcome could sway the ...

item.title: Google aurait une solution pour les smartphones Pixel qui redémarrent en boucle
item.description: Des semaines après les premiers témoignages faisant état de « bootloop » sur plusieurs modèles de Pixel, Google a une piste pour faire sortir les personnes touchées de la boucle infernale.

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy Glasses have leaked — and they look a lot like their Ray-Ban Meta rivals, but with one key advantage
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Glasses are looking good in leaked renders, and they're likely to be powered by better AI than their main rival.
